name: Crabapple Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam hard crab apples for a short time before dropping them into the syrup.
2. Combine all other ingredients to make a syrup in a large pot.
3. Tie spices in a cheesecloth bag and cook in the syrup for 5 minutes.
4. Remove the cooked apples and place them in clean jars, adding another layer until all apples are cooked.
5. Fill jars with the syrup and seal.
